ci:core/race first result.reason: Very short path with high scheduler noise in shared CI.

ci:core/fromCallback bridge.reason: Bridge test is allocation-sensitive and shows moderate variance.

ci:core/timeout success path.reason: Timer-sensitive fast path can vary significantly by host load.

ci:core/timeout error path.reason: Timer-heavy rejection path; still relatively stable.

ci:core/error channel orElse.reason: Error-path allocation/GC sensitivity introduces moderate run-to-run variance.

ci:execution/pool queue pressure.reason: Concurrency scheduling behavior varies under shared CPU.

ci:execution/coalesce settled reuse ttl>.reason: Short-duration settled-cache lookup path shows notable host-level variance.

ci:execution/coalesce ttl expiry immedia.reason: Micro-duration entry with very high relative volatility.

ci:execution/retryWhen deterministic del.reason: Macrotask scheduler-sensitive due to zero-delay retries.
